description: test exhausting every branch instead of happy path + one meaningful edge case
input:
class AccountTest < ActiveSupport::TestCase
  test "terminable? returns true when state is active" do
    assert Account.new(state: :active).terminable?
  end

  test "terminable? returns false when state is closed" do
    refute Account.new(state: :closed).terminable?
  end

  test "terminable? returns false when state is purged" do
    refute Account.new(state: :purged).terminable?
  end

  test "terminable? returns false when state is incinerated" do
    refute Account.new(state: :incinerated).terminable?
  end

  test "terminable? returns false when state is nil" do
    refute Account.new(state: nil).terminable?
  end

  test "terminable? returns false when state is empty string" do
    refute Account.new(state: '').terminable?
  end
end
